name: Ginger and Peach Chicken
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Can Peach slices, lite syrup
recipeInstructions:
1. 4 medium (12 oz total) boned, skinless chicken breast halves
2. Spray a large skillet with nonstick spray. Preheat the skillet over medium heat.
3. Add the chicken to the skillet and cook over medium heat for 8-10 minutes or until tender and no longer pink. Turn the chicken to brown evenly on all sides. Remove from the skillet and keep warm.
4. Meanwhile, drain the peaches and reserve the juice. To the reserved juice, add water to make up 1/2 cup. Stir in the cornstarch, grated gingerroot, and salt.
5. Add this mixture back into the skillet. Cook and stir until thickened and bubbly. Continue cooking and stirring for an additional minute.
6. Gently fold in the peaches and sliced water chestnuts. Heat through.
7. Arrange rice, pea pods, and chicken on a serving platter or 4 individual plates. Spoon the sauce over the chicken.
